calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2025 Continued To May-14-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Jan-31-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Jeremy Jessup, Esq. 415-421-2800 Dolan Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Cristina Ciminelli, Esq. 213-362-7777 Yukevich Cavanaugh for Defendant Uber et al.
Court reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293, 415-274-9977, sheilapham28@gmail.com, Reported.

ARGUED. Mr. Jessup contests the tentative ruling, argues and requests to include in the order that party have the ability to file in LA. Ms. Ciminelli oppposes. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC., RAISER, LLC, RAISER-CA, LLC.'s MOTION TO TRANSFER.

Defendant Uber Technologies, Inc.'s motion to transfer venue to Orange County based upon the convenience of witnesses and ends of justice is GRANTED. (CCP 397.) The only reasonable inference from the record is that key witnesses reside in or around Orange County and it would be inconvenient for them to appear in San Francisco.

(see word minutes for full details)

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293, 415-274-9977, sheilapham28@gmail.com, Reported.(302/JMQ)
